title: thymelaea pubescens subsp. thesioides
intro: Thymelaea pubescens subsp. thesioides, also known as the 'Tree Mallow', is a plant species in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The Tree Mallow has been reported to have various health benefits, including wound healing, anti-oxidant effects, and potential antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the Tree Mallow include teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
